notes_for_human_reviewer: NOVICE — face value. Reads only the spoken channel, takes the meeting at the surface ('went really well... positive and collaborative'), explicitly dismisses the fast-follow push as 'normal brainstorming', and misses every real signal (Priya echoing Tom, Lena's 1:1 + reframing question, the deferred decision, the absences). channel_reading and actionable_advice floor at 1 ('just sit tight and wait') — that's what makes it a failing novice. CALIBRATION FIX (2026-06-24): integrity_line raised 3 -> 4 — the dimension measures whether you cross into manipulation/side-taking, and a harmless, blind recap doesn't cross anything, so it genuinely sits high there (grader returns 5). The miss is in seeing, not in integrity. evidence_grounding 2; discretion 3. Tests whether the grader penalises a polite, agreeable miss on the dims that matter — being pleasant is not the same as reading the room.
